config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.nodes: MERGE (n:CodeNode {node_id: __value.node_id}) SET n.file_path = __value.file_path, n.ast_label = __value.label, n.type = __value.properties.type, n.line_number = __value.properties.line_number, n.col_offset = __value.properties.col_offset, n.end_lineno = __value.properties.end_lineno, n.end_col_offset = __value.properties.end_col_offset, n.name = __value.properties.name, n.scope = __value.properties.scope, n.code_snippet = __value.properties.code_snippet, n.event_time = __value.event_time
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.edges: MERGE (source:CodeNode {node_id: __value.source_id}) MERGE (target:CodeNode {node_id: __value.target_id}) MERGE (source)-[edge:CPG_EDGE {edge_id: __value.edge_id}]->(target) SET edge.type = __value.type, edge.file_path = __value.file_path, edge.event_time = __value.event_time, edge.child_type = __value.properties.child_type, edge.sequence = __value.properties.sequence, edge.variable_name = __value.properties.variable_name, edge.callee_name = __value.properties.callee_name, edge.call_site_line = __value.properties.call_site_line, edge.is_external = __value.properties.is_external
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: cpg.errors
